# ADR Template

## Title
<!-- Short, descriptive title of the architectural decision -->

## Status
- Proposed | Accepted | Superseded | Deprecated | Rejected

## Date
<!-- YYYY‑MM‑DD -->

## Decision Makers
- Name <email@example.com>
- Name <email@example.com>

## Context
<!-- Background information, relevant constraints, and architectural environment -->

## Problem Statement
<!-- Specific problem or need that prompted the decision -->

## Considered Options
1. Option A – brief description
2. Option B – brief description
3. Option C – brief description

## Decision
<!-- The chosen option and a concise statement of the decision -->

## Rationale
<!-- Why this option was selected over the others. Explain trade‑offs, benefits, and alignment with principles. -->

## Consequences
- **Positive** – what benefits are expected
- **Negative** – any drawbacks, maintenance impact, or future work required

## Alternatives Rejected
- List of options that were evaluated and why they were not chosen.

## Related Documents
- Link to `architecture.md` sections, design docs, or previous ADRs.

## Future Revisions
- How and when this ADR might be revisited (e.g., after a major release or when new constraints appear).

---
*This file is a living document; updates should be appended, never overwritten.*
